changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Add expected coordinate snapshot fields required for QC result traceability

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Normalize legacy discrepancy_type values before CHECK constraint update

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Align discrepancy values with Periodic QC document while retaining legacy values
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.biorepository_qc_inspection DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS check_discrepancy_type;

ALTER TABLE clinlims.biorepository_qc_inspection ADD CONSTRAINT check_discrepancy_type CHECK ( discrepancy_type IS NULL OR discrepancy_type IN ( 'SAMPLE_MISSING', 'WRONG_SAMPLE_IN_POSITION', 'MISPLACED_SAMPLE_FOUND', 'EMPTY_POSITION_REGISTERED', 'EMPTY_POSITION_REGISTERED_OCCUPIED', 'LABELING_ERROR', 'BOX_RACK_MISPLACEMENT', 'MISSING_SAMPLE', 'DAMAGED_LABEL', 'MISPLACED_ITEM', 'CONTAINER_DAMAGE', 'VOLUME_DISCREPANCY', 'OTHER' ) );
